table.name: Pixie Dust Marble
table.caption: Pixie Dust Marble
rows: The marble explodes, dealing {@damage 1d8} piercing damage.

The marble bursts open, coating the target in faerie dust. For one minute, sheds {@variantrule Dim Light|XPHB} in a 10-foot radius, can't benefit from the {@condition Invisible|XPHB} condition and {@action Attack|XPHB} rolls against it have {@variantrule Advantage|XPHB}.
The target is {@condition Charmed|XPHB} by you for 1 minute or until the target takes any damage.
The target is {@condition Frightened|XPHB} of you until the start of your next turn.
The target has {@variantrule Disadvantage|XPHB} on its next saving throws within the next minute.
You and the target swap places.
The target turns {@condition Invisible|XPHB} until the start of your next turn.
A 15-foot Cube around the target is filled with magical Darkness, which lasts until the start of your next turn.
The target is {@condition Restrained|XPHB} for 1 minute. The target can attempt a Strength saving throw at the end of each of its turns, ending the effect on itself on a success.
The target is healed for {@dice 2d8} Hit Points.
The target is Reduced for 1 minute. See the {@spell Enlarge/Reduce|XPHB} spell for more details.
The target is Enlarged for 1 minute. See the {@spell Enlarge/Reduce|XPHB} spell for more details.
The target sprouts insectile wings and gains a {@variantrule Flying Speed|XPHB} of 30 feet for 1 minute.
The target is transported to the Astral Plane until the start of your next turn.

The target needs to succeed on a Constitution saving throw or be {@condition Paralyzed|XPHB} for 1 minute. The target can attempt a Constitution saving throw at the end of each of its turns, ending the effect on itself on a success.
The target has {@variantrule Vulnerability|XPHB} to Radiant damage until the start of your next turn.
The target has {@variantrule Vulnerability|XPHB} to Cold damage until the start of your next turn.
The target has {@variantrule Vulnerability|XPHB} to Lightning damage until the start of your next turn.
The target has {@variantrule Vulnerability|XPHB} to Poison damage until the start of your next turn.
The target takes {@damage 2d8} Psychic damage and is {@condition Stunned|XPHB} until the start of your next turn.
The target takes {@damage 6d6} Force damage

The target must succeed on a Wisdom saving throw or be under the effect of the {@spell Confusion|XPHB} spell for 1 minute. The target can attempt a Wisdom saving throw at the end of each of its turns, ending the effect on itself on a success.
The targets is {@spell Polymorph|XPHB|polymorphed} into yourself

The marble explodes. The target and each creature in a in a 15-foot {@variantrule Emanation [Area of Effect]|XPHB|Emanation} makes a Constitution saving throw, taking {@damage 3d8} Thunder damage on a failed save or half as much damage on a successful one. A Construct has {@variantrule Disadvantage|XPHB} on the save.
The target is permanently {@condition Petrified|XPHB}.
The target is trapped into a flask until you release it. While in the flask, the creature doesn't age and doesn't need to eat, drink or breathe.

entries.name: Cantrips
entries: You can cast the {@spell Chill Touch|XPHB} and {@spell Toll the Dead|XPHB} cantrips from this necklace using your spellcasting or pact magic feature.

entries.name: Spells
entries: You always have the {@spell Inflict Wounds|XPHB} and {@spell Aura of Decay|5BBPrivate} spells prepared. You can cast each of these spells once without expending a spell slot and regain the ability to do so when you finish a {@variantrule Long Rest|XPHB}. You can also cast the spells using any spell slots you have of the appropriate level.

entries.name: While Attuned
entries: While attuned to the Artifact, it adjusts the following aspects of your body and mind:

items: You loos all sense of smell.
You kill any nonmagical vegetation you touch that isn't a creature.
You have resistance to Necrotic damage.
You have vulnerability to Radiant damage.
You have advantage on saving throws against being {@condition Poisoned|XPHB} or {@condition Frightened|XPHB}.
You gain a +1 bonus to spell attack rolls and the saving throw DCs of spells you cast from the Necromancy school of magic.

entries.name: While Unattuned
entries: At initiative count 20 on every round, every creature within 30 ft. of the necklace takes {@damage 1d6} Necrotic damage. Undead and constructs are immune to this damage. This effect passes through total cover, but not through lead. A creature can stop this effect by starting the process of attuning to the necklace.

spell.name: Aura of Decay
entries: Life-decaying energy radiates from you in a 30-foot {@variantrule Emanation [Area of Effect]|XPHB|Emanation} for the duration. Whenever the {@variantrule Emanation [Area of Effect]|XPHB|Emanation} enters a creature's space and whenever a creature enters the {@variantrule Emanation [Area of Effect]|XPHB|Emanation} or ends its turn there, the creature must make a Constitution saving throw. On a failed save, the creature takes {@damage 3d6} Necrotic damage. On a successful save, the creature takes half as much damage. A creature makes this save only once per turn. This effect passes through total cover, but not through lead.
Undead and constructs are immune to this spell.

entriesHigherLevel.name: Using a Higher-Level Spell Slot
entries: The damage increases by {@scaledamage 3d6|3-9|1d6} for each spell slot level above 3.
